steps.title: Identify the side ratio
steps.content: For angle $X$, the opposite side is $222$ and the adjacent side is $296$. Tangent is opposite over adjacent.

steps.title: Simplify the tangent
steps.content:
Set up the ratio and reduce it.
$$\tan X=\frac{222}{296}$$
$$\frac{222}{296}=\frac{111}{148}=\frac{3}{4}$$
The answer is C.
